mapper.sql: su.id id, su.type_code type_code, su.type_name type_name, su.sort_no sort_no, su.status status, su.remark remark, su.create_time create_time, su.update_time update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_schedule_type (type_code, type_name, sort_no, status, remark, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{type_code}, #{type_name}, #{sort_no}, IFNULL(#{status},'1'), #{remark}, DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))
